title: Hospital campus cyber-physical correlation demo seed
purpose: Demo seed data for a cyber-physical correlation engine hackathon prototype.
linked_hypothesis: A facilities badge identity appears in restricted areas near the same time as suspicious person reports and external OSINT signals around the hospital perimeter and pharmacy corridor.

files.name: badge_events.csv
files.description: Background badge traffic plus one suspicious movement pattern.

files.name: suspicious_person_reports.csv
files.description: Physical security reports that can be correlated by time and location.

files.name: osint_posts.csv
files.description: Public posts that may reinforce situational context around the incident.

demo_focus.decision: Observe vs Verify Now vs Escalate Now
